violations.description: Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Convection oven not located properly under hood system.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Dunnage racks in walk in cooler have food debris build up and mold developing. Need to be cleaned and sanitized.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Wire rack shelving in facility, lower shelves to prep tables, and area around cooking equipment have a buildup of debris and need cleaning.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood has an accumulation of soot/grease and needs cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors have and accumulation of food and debris under equipment on cook line, in walk in cooler/freezer, and in ice cream station. Ceiling tiles around HVAC vent near prep sink have an accumulation of dust/grease and need cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Replace missing ceiling tile near cook line.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
